subject: transfer of bond business from enac to eci

emails.subject: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Cheryl: Where do we stand on the ECT Credit Inc. three (3) accounts? Richard: Do you have the proposed U.S. slate for Teresa? We do not know who you want as officers/directors. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 03/20/2001 02:05 PM Teresa Callahan/ENRON@enronXgate 03/20/2001 01:59 PM

emails.subject: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Cheryl: Attached are a series of messages regarding the Enron Credit Inc. slate of officers. This has been going on for some time. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 04/02/2001 04:59 PM Sara Shackleton 03/21/2001 11:47 AM

emails.subject: Re: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Re: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI Sara, I am well aware of these emails. You are correct this has been going on for some time but I hope that you do not mean to suggest that the lack of resolution is due to any negligence on my part. As I already explained to you at our meeting today that (1) the information that Richard Sage provided to us was not accurate; (2) and (2) has been constantly changing BOTH within the database and from Richard's perspective. Moreover, I figured out that it did not make sense to have officers from both the U.S. and London. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/02/2001 05:08 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Re: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI Sara, I am well aware of these emails. You are correct this has been going on for some time but I hope that you do not mean to suggest that the lack of resolution is due to any negligence on my part. As I already explained to you at our meeting today that (1) the information that Richard Sage provided to us was not accurate; (2) and (2) has been constantly changing BOTH within the database and from Richard's perspective. Moreover, I figured out that it did not make sense to have officers from both the U.S. and London. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/02/2001 05:08 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.subject_base: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI
emails.body: Re: FW: Transfer of bond business from ENAC to ECI Sara, Moreover, with the exception of the email dated on the 20th, the other emails are not addressed to me; indeed, a major concern of mine which clearly slowed down the execution of this package of agreements was that I was not included in conversations about the status and any change in deadlines etc. Perhaps in part that is because for the bulk of the time period in which we worked on Enron Credit Inc., you took responsibility for the Bear Stearns agreements until you turned the agreements over to me at 3 p.m. on Friday the 12th and I began, at that time a legal review of the agreements. Moreover, no one represented to me at that time that this agreement had to be done first and right away. I just learned that last week from the business people when I reported that the Morgan agreements were ready for execution. I had completed my review of the other two Enron Credit Inc. account agreements. Furthermore, you indicated that I should keep the paralegals involved; my records of this project indicate that you asked Stephanie to complete the Authorized Officers list, and that you had signed off on it. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/02/2001 05:08 PM
